package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareContainsBusinessOrchestration() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_contains_business_orchestration"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Middleware that performs domain workflows instead of cross-cutting concerns such as auth, tracing, or request enrichment."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
